name: Water Chemistry for Brewing
description: A practical guide to water chemistry for home and craft brewers. Covers mineral ions, water profiles, adjustments, and style-specific targets.

content.title: Water Chemistry Guide
content.description: A comprehensive, practical guide to understanding and adjusting water chemistry for brewing.

content.title: Mineral Ion Reference Chart
content.description: Reference data: common mineral additions, their ion contributions, and typical dosing rates.

content.title: Classic Water Profiles
content.description: Historical and style-specific water profiles (Burton, Dublin, Pilsen, Munich, etc.).

content.title: Water Adjustment Workflow
content.description: Step-by-step decision workflow for adjusting brewing water.
